T0172.title: Counter Channel
T0172.definition: In data leak lookups, a term used by underground actors to refer to bank insiders, highlighting the reliability of the channel and authenticity of the data, typically involving financial fraud insiders abusing their authority.
T0172.description: In data leak lookups, a term used by underground actors to refer to bank insiders, highlighting the reliability of the channel and authenticity of the data, typically involving financial fraud insiders abusing their authority.
T0172.usageExample: "Counter service, full range, returns on Sunday, super low prices—hit me up for orders."
